harborTours.title: NYC Harbor Sightseeing Tours
harborTours.shortDescription: Experience New York from the deck of a private luxury yacht. See the Statue of Liberty, the Manhattan skyline, and the Brooklyn Bridge on a comfortable, VIP-style boat tour.
highlights: Private yacht experience for up to 13 guests
Fully narrated by experienced, entertaining captains
Climate-controlled cabin with full kitchen and dining
Free Wi-Fi, A/C outlets, and charging ports
Outdoor deck seating for unobstructed views
One-hour tours departing from Staten Island, NY

fishingCharters.title: Inshore & Offshore Fishing Charters
fishingCharters.shortDescription: Navigate the creeks, canals, inlets, and coastal waters of the New Jersey coast. From half-day inshore trips to overnight offshore canyon runs, we put you on the fish.
highlights: Inshore, midshore, and offshore options available
Expert local captains who know the waters
Departing from Belmar and Barnegat Light, NJ
fishingLocations: Inner Coastal (Manasquan Channel to Barnegat Bay)
